name: Daniells Auto Care
description: Premium mobile auto detailing & ceramic coating, Northern NJ. Dark showroom-precision redesign — detailing bay at night metaphor, red-accented, concept-locked per approved design system.

concept.bet: This website IS a premium automotive showroom after hours — the lights are low, the vehicle is the focus, and every surface reflects the brand's relentless precision. Red is the signal color of detail, urgency, and craft.
concept.metaphor: A high-end detailing bay at night — black epoxy floor, vehicle under focused light, red accent lines on tools and work orders, the glow of ceramic coating curing under inspection lamps.
concept.signatureDevice: The Treatment Log — a red-stamped metadata block on every service card reading like a detailer's work order: service code, treatment stages, time estimate, status indicator.

treatmentLog.description: Red-stamped metadata block on every service card — reads like a detailer's work order.
treatmentLog.css: font-family: JetBrains Mono; font-size: 0.65rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; background: var(--surface-dark-2); border-top: 1px solid rgba(232,5,5,0.3); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(232,5,5,0.3); padding: var(--pin) var(--bolt);

redGlowReveal.description: Cards and gallery images have a red radial gradient that intensifies on hover, tracking cursor position. Simulates inspection lamp aimed at surface.
redGlowReveal.mechanism: CSS custom properties --mx and --my set via JS mousemove event. Radial gradient at cursor position fades in on hover.

gradients.serviceCards: radial-gradient(ellipse 300px 200px at var(--mx) var(--my), rgba(232,5,5,0.12), transparent 70%)
gradients.gallery: radial-gradient(ellipse 300px 200px at var(--mx) var(--my), rgba(232,5,5,0.10), transparent 70%)
gradients.fleet: radial-gradient(ellipse 300px 200px at var(--mx) var(--my), rgba(232,5,5,0.10), transparent 70%)
gradients.reviews: radial-gradient(ellipse 250px 180px at var(--mx) var(--my), rgba(232,5,5,0.08), transparent 70%)

redGlowReveal.hoverChain: 1. border: rule→rgba(232,5,5,0.3); 2. transform: translateY(-2px); 3. box-shadow: shadow-sm→shadow-red; 4. red radial gradient fades in at cursor; 5. all transitions 200ms ease

gradientCtaBar.description: Full-width animated gradient bar (red→dark red) pulsing between sections, carrying trust signal marquee. Also used as button bg.
gradientCtaBar.animation: 30s linear infinite marquee, 4s alternate pulse between 0.85-1.0 opacity

business.name: Daniells Auto Care
business.tagline: Professional Auto Detailing. Same-Day Service. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.

services.name: Car Detailing
services.short: Complete interior and exterior detailing for pristine results.
services.long: Full-vehicle detail combining our interior deep-clean and exterior restoration for a showroom finish, inside and out.

services.name: Exterior Detailing
services.short: Expert exterior detailing that restores and protects your finish.
services.long: Hand wash, decontamination, gloss restoration and protection that brings your paint back to life and shields it from the elements.

services.name: Interior Detailing
services.short: Deep cleaning, steam extraction and leather conditioning.
services.long: Showroom-fresh cabins: steam extraction, shampoo, leather conditioning and sanitization of every surface.

services.name: Ceramic Coating
services.short: Ultimate paint protection with a 2–10 year warranty.
services.long: Hydrophobic ceramic coating that repels water and contaminants, deepens gloss and protects your paint for years.

services.name: Paint Correction
services.long: Multi-stage machine polishing that removes defects and restores a flawless, mirror-like factory finish.

services.name: Paint Protection Film
services.short: Self-healing film protection against chips and scratches.
services.long: Virtually invisible self-healing film that guards high-impact areas against rock chips, scratches and road debris.

services.name: Window Tinting
services.short: Heat rejection, privacy and UV protection.
services.long: Premium window film with a lifetime warranty — cooler cabins, reduced glare, UV protection and a clean, finished look.

services.name: Fleet Detailing
services.short: Keep your business fleet looking professional.
services.long: Dedicated corporate detailing programs with on-site mobile service, volume pricing and account management.

reviews.name: Carlton George
reviews.quote: The car was parked under a tree for two years and collected a lot of dirt. When finished it looked showroom ready inside and out.

reviews.name: Motivational Josh
reviews.quote: One of the best detailing experiences I've ever had. From start to finish the service was professional, efficient, and super convenient.

reviews.name: Brandon Bueno Rivera
reviews.quote: Completed a full interior & exterior detail on my niece's car. Very professional, on time, and the results were fantastic.

components.name: site
components.contract: exports all business/services/areas/reviews/stats/nav constants from this spec. Services include code, stage, estHours, status for Treatment Log.

components.name: Section
components.contract: sections alternate bg per backgroundRhythm: hero=#050505, standard=#0A0A0A, testimonial=#141414, footer=#050505. Pass bg prop or auto-detect by position.

components.name: Button
components.contract: Three variants: primary(solid #E80505, hover #980404, text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing 0.05em, rounded 4px, padding 0.85rem 1.75rem), outline(transparent, white border #2A2A2A→#E80505 hover), phone(transparent, #E80505 border). All: font-weight 700, display inline-flex, gap 0.5rem, transition 200ms ease. Focus: outline 2px #E80505, offset 2px.

components.name: GlassCard
components.contract: bg-#141414, border #2A2A2A, rounded 12px. Red Glow Reveal: track mouse position via --mx/--my CSS vars, radial-gradient at cursor on hover. Hover chain: border→rgba(232,5,5,0.3), translateY(-2px), shadow→shadow-red. All transitions 200ms ease. No glass/backdrop-blur (anti-pattern: glass is not the concept).

components.name: SectionHeading
components.contract: Eyebrow (Montserrat, uppercase, #E80505, 0.75rem, tracking 0.1em) + title (Montserrat, 700) + optional subtitle (#B0B0B0). Can be centered or left.

components.name: StarRating
components.contract: lucide Star, fill #FBBF24 for count (yellow trust stars — not red stars — per design system). Empty stars #484848.

components.name: Reveal
components.contract: framer-motion: opacity 0→1, y 20→0, duration 0.7s, ease cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1). respects prefers-reduced-motion. stagger support by index.

components.name: Marquee
components.contract: infinite horizontal scroll, animation 30s linear infinite. Duplicate items for seamless loop. Red dot separator (8px, #E80505, rounded-full) before each item.

components.name: Navbar
components.contract: 80px height. Background #050505. Text #FFFFFF. Sticky. Logo left. Primary nav with dropdowns for services/areas. Phone + Get Free Quote CTA right. Mobile drawer with hamburger. Active link underlines with #E80505.

components.name: Footer
components.contract: Background #050505 (bookends with hero). Brand blurb. Columns: Services, Service Areas, Company. Phone/hours. Legal links. Licensed & insured badge. Montserrat text.

components.name: ServiceCard
components.contract: GlassCard with Red Glow Reveal. Top: lucide icon (#E80505, 2rem). Middle: Service name (Montserrat, 1.25rem, 700, #FFFFFF). Short description (#B0B0B0). Bottom: Treatment Log block — JetBrains Mono 0.65rem uppercase, format '[SVC-CODE] · {name} · STAGE {n} · EST. {x}-HRS · ● {STATUS}'. Status dot colors: READY=#4ADE80 pulse, BOOKING=#E80505 pulse. Link to /services/[slug].

components.name: StatStrip
components.contract: Grid of 4 stat tiles. Each: large value (Montserrat, 3xl clamp, 700, #FFFFFF) + label (#B0B0B0, 0.875rem). Background #141414, border #2A2A2A, rounded 12px. Subtle red gradient hover per Red Glow Reveal.

components.name: ReviewCard
components.contract: GlassCard with Red Glow Reveal (review variant: radial-gradient ellipse 250px 180px, rgba(232,5,5,0.08)). StarRating yellow 5 stars. Quote italic (#B0B0B0). Name (#FFFFFF, 600). When (#6E6E6E). Google 'G' icon.

components.name: QuoteForm
components.contract: Client form on #141414 surface. Fields: name, phone, email, vehicle, service(select from services), message. Inputs: bg #141414, border #2A2A2A, focus border #E80505, error border #E80505. Labels: Montserrat, 0.875rem, #B0B0B0. Submit: primary button (Get My Free Quote). Validation: client-side required+format. Loading state: button spinner. Success state: green check + confirmation message. Error state: inline field errors. Posts to /api/quote.

components.name: QuoteCTA
components.contract: Full-width Gradient CTA Bar: linear-gradient(135deg,#E80505,#980404). Contains trust marquee animation. Below gradient: headline + description + Primary Button + Phone Button. Padding 48px. This is the Gradient CTA Bar signature move — appears between sections 2-3, 4-5, and before final CTA.

components.name: TreatmentLog
components.contract: The Treatment Log signature device. Props: code, name, stage, estHours, status. JetBrains Mono, 0.65rem, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.06em, #B0B0B0 text. Red top/bottom border rgba(232,5,5,0.3). Background #080808. Padding 4px 12px. Fields separated by middle dot in #484848. Status dot: pulsing animation (2s infinite scale), color by status (READY=#4ADE80, BOOKING=#E80505).

sections: fonts (Montserrat+JetBrains Mono via next/font/google)
CSS globals with all :root design tokens from this spec

metadata: title='Daniells Auto Care | Premium Mobile Auto Detailing NJ', description='Professional mobile auto detailing in Northern NJ. Same-day service, ceramic coating, paint correction. 300+ five-star reviews. Free quotes.', openGraph image
JSON-LD Organization schema with LocalBusiness markup, address, phone, geo coordinates for Northern NJ
Navbar
{children}
Footer
Analytics: GA4 snippet if configured

Hero: dark surface (#050505). Montserrat display headline (4xl-6xl clamp, 700, #FFFFFF). Subheadline (#B0B0B0). Dual CTA (primary+outline). Stat strip preview (4 glass stat tiles). Red gradient trust marquee bar beneath hero (signature move 3).
Services grid: 8 ServiceCards in 3-column responsive grid. Each has icon, name, short desc, Treatment Log.
Why choose us: 4 GlassCards (mobile service, licensed/insured, warranty 2-10yr, 15-min response). Background #0A0A0A.
Gradient CTA Bar (trust marquee) between sections 2-3.
Process: 4-step 'Book → Detail → Protect → Enjoy' with numbered steps and red connecting line. Background #0A0A0A.
Gallery preview: 6-image responsive grid (2-col desktop) with Red Glow Reveal on hover. Background #141414.
Gradient CTA Bar between sections 4-5.
Reviews: 3 ReviewCards + Google rating badge (4.9★). Background #141414.
Service areas teaser: grid of 10 towns linking to /service-areas/[slug] + full Marquee of area names.
Final CTA: Gradient CTA Bar full-width. Headline 'Ready For Showroom-Quality?' + primary button + phone button. Background gradient then #050505.
SectionHeading (eyebrow: 'Our Services', title: 'Precision Detailing, Certified Results')
Grid of all 8 ServiceCards in 3-column responsive grid with TreatmentLogs
QuoteCTA (Gradient CTA Bar with trust marquee)

pages.note: ONE dynamic page for all services. generateStaticParams from services array. 404 if unknown slug.
sections: Hero: service name (Montserrat, 4xl, 700), icon, long description, Treatment Log block, primary CTA + phone CTA. Background #050505.
What's Included: numbered list of treatment stages (from service.stage count) with descriptive items. Background #0A0A0A.
Why It Matters: 2-3 benefit cards explaining impact. Background #0A0A0A.
Related Services: 3 ServiceCards (excluding current). Background #0A0A0A.
QuoteCTA (Gradient CTA Bar)
SectionHeading (eyebrow: 'Service Areas', title: 'Mobile Detailing Across Northern NJ')
Grid/list of 10 towns, each card: town name (Montserrat, 600), 'mobile detailing available', icon. Links to /service-areas/[slug]. Background #0A0A0A.
Marquee of area names
QuoteCTA

pages.note: ONE dynamic page for all areas. generateStaticParams from areas. 404 if unknown.
sections: Hero: 'Mobile Auto Detailing in {town}, NJ' (Montserrat, 4xl, 700), description, primary CTA. Background #050505.
Services Available: grid of ServiceCards most relevant to the area. Background #0A0A0A.
Local Reviews: ReviewCards if available. Background #141414.
QuoteCTA
Hero: 'Corporate Fleet Detailing' with description and CTA. Background #050505.
Program Benefits: 4 GlassCards (on-site mobile, volume pricing, account management, scheduled maintenance) with Red Glow Reveal fleet variant. Background #0A0A0A.
How It Works: 3-step process. Background #080808 (#surface-dark-2 exception per design system).
QuoteCTA
Hero: 'Our Team' with story/values. Background #050505.
Certifications: GlassCards listing trust items (licensed & insured, factory-trained, warranty details). Background #0A0A0A.
Stats: StatStrip of 4 stats. Background #0A0A0A.
QuoteCTA
SectionHeading (eyebrow: 'Gallery', title: 'Before & After Transformations')
Responsive image grid (2-col desktop, 1-col mobile). Each image has Red Glow Reveal (gallery variant) on hover. Background #0A0A0A (exception per design system).
QuoteCTA
SectionHeading (eyebrow: 'Blog', title: 'Auto Care Tips & Insights')
Post card grid (3-col desktop). Each card: image, title (Montserrat, 600), date (#6E6E6E), excerpt (#B0B0B0). GlassCard with hover red glow. Background #0A0A0A.

pages.note: ONE dynamic placeholder. generateStaticParams from posts list.
sections: Article header (title, date, reading time). Montserrat heading.
Body (readable width, Montserrat, 1rem, line-height 1.7, #B0B0B0).
JSON-LD Article schema.
QuoteCTA
Hero: 'Get Your Free Quote' with description, phone number, response time. Background #050505.
QuoteForm: Full quote form with all fields. Background #141414 (#surface exception per design system).
Contact details: phone, hours, service area, response time, licensed badge. Background #0A0A0A.
POST handler: validate required fields (name, phone, email, service), return { ok: true, message } on success, return 400 with field errors on validation failure. Rate limit: 5 per IP per minute.
Centered on-brand 404: 'Page Not Found' heading, 'Back to Home' primary CTA. Background #050505.

seo.homeTitle: Daniells Auto Care | Premium Mobile Auto Detailing NJ
seo.homeDescription: Professional mobile auto detailing in Northern NJ. Same-day service, ceramic coating, paint correction. 300+ five-star reviews. Free quotes in 15 minutes.
seo.titleRules: 50-60 chars per page, unique, primary keyword near beginning, brand at end with | separator
seo.metaDescriptionRules: 150-160 chars, unique per page, include keyword naturally, server-rendered in next metadata export
seo.headingRules: Exactly one H1 per page containing primary keyword. Sequential hierarchy H1→H2→H3. All headings visible in server HTML (no client-only headings).
seo.urlRules: Human-readable, hyphens not underscores, lowercase, under 75 chars, reflect hierarchy
schemas: Organization (homepage — name, address NJ, phone, url)
seo.imageSeo: All images: descriptive alt text (not file names), WebP/AVIF format, explicit width/height, lazy load below fold, preload hero, under 200KB standard / 500KB hero

performance.fonts: font-display: swap on all fonts, subset to latin, preload Montserrat 700
performance.images: next/image with explicit width/height, lazy loading below fold, priority on hero, AVIF/WebP via next/image
performance.noRenderBlockers: No render-blocking CSS or JS in <head>

accessibility.contrast: ≥4.5:1 for all text (white #FFFFFF on #0A0A0A = 19.2:1 ✓, light #B0B0B0 on #0A0A0A = 8.9:1 ✓)
accessibility.focus: visible focus rings on all interactive elements (2px solid #E80505, offset 2px)
accessibility.altText: Descriptive alt text on all images. Decorative images: empty alt=''
accessibility.labels: All form inputs have associated labels. Icon-only buttons have aria-label
accessibility.keyboard: Full keyboard navigation. No keyboard traps. Skip-to-content link
accessibility.reducedMotion: prefers-reduced-motion respected throughout (framer-motion respects, marquee pauses)

security.secrets: No API keys, tokens, or secrets in client bundles
security.inputValidation: Server-side validation on all form submissions. Sanitize inputs.
security.xss: React's built-in XSS protection. No dangerouslySetInnerHTML without sanitization
security.headers: Content-Security-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY via next.config.js headers()

analytics.ga4: Add GA4 measurement ID in env if available
analytics.events: Track: form_start, form_submit, cta_click, phone_call, service_view, quote_request
analytics.consent: Cookie consent banner if GA4 enabled (per GDPR/CCPA)

assets.policy: Phase 1 = curated dark-toned Unsplash auto-detailing/luxury-car photos (known-good URLs). Phase 2 = OpenRouter image worker replaces with branded generated assets.

matrix.mood: dark moody luxury car detail, close-up wet gloss reflections

matrix.use: Open Graph share image 1200x630, dark bg with red accent + 'Daniells Auto Care' text

globalRules: DARK THEME ONLY. Backgrounds alternate per backgroundRhythm: hero=#050505, standard=#0A0A0A, testimonials=#141414, footer=#050505. Pure #000000 is an anti-pattern — never use it as background surface.
BRAND RED #E80505 for CTAs, accents, focus rings, Treatment Log borders, Gradient CTA Bar, status dots. NEVER red for body text (contrast). NEVER red stars (stars are trust yellow #FBBF24).
USE CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES defined in :root. Map them to Tailwind config. All design tokens must be CSS vars first.
FONTS: Montserrat (headings + body, weight 400/600/700). JetBrains Mono (Treatment Log, code stamps, specs). Google Fonts via next/font/google with font-display:swap.

SIGNATURE MOVES must be implemented exactly as specified: Treatment Log on every ServiceCard, Red Glow Reveal on all cards/gallery, Gradient CTA Bar between sections. These are what make the site unmistakable — do not omit or reduce them.

TREATMENT LOG: JetBrains Mono, 0.65rem, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.06em, red top/bottom border rgba(232,5,5,0.3), bg #080808, fields separated by · in #484848. Format: [SVC-CODE] · {name} · STAGE {n} · EST. {x}-HRS · ● {STATUS}

RED GLOW REVEAL: mousemove tracking via --mx/--my CSS vars. On hover: border→rgba(232,5,5,0.3), translateY(-2px), shadow→shadow-red, radial gradient fades in at cursor. All transitions 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1).
GRADIENT CTA BAR: linear-gradient(135deg,#E80505,#980404), full-width, 24px padding, trust marquee (30s infinite), subtle pulse (4s alternate opacity 0.85-1.0). Red dot separators between items.

BUTTONS: Primary = #E80505 bg, hover #980404, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.05em, rounded 4px, font-weight 700. Outline = transparent, white #2A2A2A border→#E80505 on hover. Phone = transparent, #E80505 border. All: 200ms ease transition.
Every page imports Navbar/Footer from layout. Do not redefine.
All content from lib/site.ts (this spec) — no invented facts, no lorem ipsum in shipped UI.
framer-motion Reveal on section entrances (opacity 0→1, y 20→0, 0.7s, cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1)). Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Accessibility: focus rings (2px #E80505, offset 2px), descriptive alt text, labelled form fields, 44px touch targets, skip-to-content link.
SEO: Unique title (50-60 chars) and meta description (150-160 chars) per page. Exactly one H1 with primary keyword. JSON-LD schema on relevant pages. Next.js metadata API.
Performance: next/image with width/height, lazy load below fold, priority on hero. font-display:swap. AVIF/WebP.
Security: Server-side form validation. Rate limit /api/quote. No secrets in client bundles. next.config.js security headers.

ANTI-PATTERNS (NEVER DO THESE): glass surfaces/backdrop-blur (not the concept), cream/off-white/paper backgrounds, Sora or Inter fonts (must be Montserrat), serif fonts, rounded-full buttons (anti-pattern: use 4px), emoji, gold/amber/yellow as accent, light theme, generic car-wash vibe, AI-slop copy, lorem ipsum, placeholders in production.
